mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT trade_date FROM margin_daily WHERE trade_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND exchange = #{exchange} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY trade_date
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(margin_balance), 0) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(short_balance), 0) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_balance), 0) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stock_code) FROM margin_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_daily WHERE exchange = #{exchange} AND is_deleted = 0
